{ "name": "punycode", "version": "2.3.1", "description": "A robust Punycode converter that fully complies to RFC 3492 and RFC 5891, and works on nearly all JavaScript platforms.", "homepage": "https://mths.be/punycode", "main": "punycode.js", "jsnext:main": "punycode.es6.js", "module": "punycode.es6.js", "engines": { "node": ">=6" }, "keywords": [ "punycode", "unicode", "idn", "idna", "dns", "url", "domain" ], "license": "MIT", "author": { "name": "Mathias Bynens", "url": "https://mathiasbynens.be/" }, "contributors": [ { "name": "Mathias Bynens", "url": "https://mathiasbynens.be/" } ], "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/mathiasbynens/punycode.js.git" }, "bugs": "https://github.com/mathiasbynens/punycode.js/issues", "files": [ "LICENSE-MIT.txt", "punycode.js", "punycode.es6.js" ], "scripts": { "test": "mocha tests", "build": "node scripts/prepublish.js" }, "devDependencies": { "codecov": "^3.8.3", "nyc": "^15.1.0", "mocha": "^10.2.0" }, "jspm": { "map": { "./punycode.js": { "node": "@node/punycode" } } } }
